query:
INSERT INTO categories (id, name, color, space_id) VALUES
    (?1 || '_salary',              'Salary',                  '#22c55e', ?1),
    (?1 || '_other_income',        'Other Income',            '#10b981', ?1),
    (?1 || '_savings_investments', 'Savings & Investments',   '#06b6d4', ?1),
    (?1 || '_household_services',  'Household & Services',    '#3b82f6', ?1),
    (?1 || '_transport',           'Transport',               '#6366f1', ?1),
    (?1 || '_food_drinks',         'Food & Drinks',           '#f97316', ?1),
    (?1 || '_shopping',            'Shopping',                '#ec4899', ?1),
    (?1 || '_health_beauty',       'Health & Beauty',         '#8b5cf6', ?1),
    (?1 || '_leisure',             'Leisure',                 '#eab308', ?1),
    (?1 || '_other',               'Other',                   '#6b7280', ?1)
